name: GH_PluginFolderType
summary: Enumerates the possible folder types for GH_AssemblyFolderInfo

enum_values.name: Core
enum_values.summary: The Core folder is the one where native Grasshopper GHA files are installed.

enum_values.name: Default
enum_values.summary: The Default folder is where Grasshopper puts 3rd party GHA files.

enum_values.name: RhiFolder
enum_values.summary: A RhiFolder folder is created by an RHI installer package.

enum_values.name: UserFolder
enum_values.summary: A UserFolder is created by the user via the _GrasshopperDeveloperSettings command.
